posts.text:
Yep kicks in this time every year.  Hope to shake it soon.


Greg Mercer (@mercerboy)

It must be allergy season... @BretBaier Is losing his voice again! Hope it's not too bad for you this year.



— https://nitter.net/mercerboy/status/2034404989037105575#m

Send away.


Brian Nelson (@RealBrianEarl)

He is on with @BretBaier tonight. We should send questions we have to Bret.



— https://nitter.net/RealBrianEarl/status/2033990800535683222#m

🙏’s up!


Susie Wiles (@SusieWiles)

Last week, I was diagnosed with breast cancer.

Nearly one in eight women in the United States will face this diagnosis. Every day, these women continue to raise their families, go to work, and serve their communities with strength and determination. I now join their ranks.

I am grateful to have an outstanding team of doctors who detected the cancer early and are guiding my care, and I am encouraged by a very good prognosis.

I am also deeply thankful for th
RT @MarcACaputo: Trump announces his trusted chief of staff, Susie Wiles, has early stage breast cancer, will be undergoing treatment and r…

Lots happens behind the scenes, and I had a great time interviewing Senate Majority Leader John Thune. Be sure to catch my interview on @Fox News ! #Interview #Senate #JohnThune #Politics #BehindTheScenes
Here are some behind the scenes clips from my exclusive interview with Senate Majority Leader John Thune  #behindthescene #bts #interviews
Replying to @goodgrief1991  Thank you all for sending in your questions have a great Saint Patrick’s Day #tiktoktuesday
It’s TikTok Tuesday be sure to send in your questions in the comments or stitch this video with a video of yourself and your question and happy Saint Patrick’s Day 🍀
I had a great time interviewing Irish Prime Minister (Taoiseach) Micheál Martin on #specialreport
Be sure to tune in to #SpecialReport tomorrow for an exclusive interview with Senator John Thune at 6PM ET on @Fox News
Our panel last night broke down their thoughts on the DHS stalled funding and the effects it’s having on TSA #specialreport #tsa
Mt. Kilauea has erupted for the 43rd time since December 2024 #news #hawaii
Last night our panel shared their thoughts on President Trumps handling of Operation Epic Fury on #specialreport
A little clip from my exclusive interview with CEO of BlackRock Larry Fink #specialreport #interview
